AT0027.title: Card Vending Platforms
AT0027.description: Card vending platforms (auto-delivery card platforms) are online platforms that provide automated transaction services for virtual goods. Merchants can input virtual product information (such as game activation codes, accounts, membership keys, phone recharge cards, etc.) into the platform, and the system automatically delivers goods upon payment, enabling 24/7 unmanned transactions. In the black/gray market, these platforms are widely used for selling and distributing illegal accounts, personal information, black card keys, and other prohibited virtual goods, serving as critical infrastructure for the black/gray market resource trading network. Due to their typical features of anonymity, automated transactions, and rapid fund flow, many criminal groups use them for batch selling of illegal virtual goods and fund settlement.

references.title: Behind the Scaling of Gray/Black Markets: The Resource Trading Network Composed of Card Vending Platforms
